Profile Settings

Members who add an industry receive up to 2.5x as many profile views.

Type or select from suggestions

🤖 Used by AI assistant to address you correctly (his/her). When shown, visitors will see your gender on your profile.

Recommended size: 1200 x 400 pixels. Max 5MB.

Available Icons (BoxIcons): bx bxl-react, bx bxl-python, bx bxl-javascript, bx bxl-nodejs, bx bxl-mongodb, bx bxl-html5, bx bxl-css3, bx bxl-git, bx bxl-github, bx bxl-docker, bx bxl-aws, bx bxl-figma

Store Pages

Custom pages appear in your store navigation. Default pages (Products, About, Contact) are always shown.

Shortcodes

Create dynamic content with shortcodes. Use them in any page content to display products, forms, and more.

Loading shortcodes...

How to use: Write [products limit="6" type="digital"] in your page content. The shortcode will be replaced with actual products when viewed.

Add Custom Page

            
        

        
        

            
            
            

                
                

                    
                    

                        /shop/username/
                        
                    

                    
Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. No spaces.

                

                
                
                

                    
                    
                

                
                
                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    
                    
Supports HTML formatting (h1, p, ul, img, etc.)

                

                
                
                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    
                    
CSS will be injected into the page head. Use standard CSS syntax.

                

                
                
                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    
                    
⚠️ Be careful with JavaScript. Malicious code may be removed for security.

                        Show on Store Navigation
                        
When disabled, the page won't appear in your store menu

Create Custom Shortcode

            
        

        
        

            
            
            

                
                

                    
                    

                        [
                        
                        ]
                    

                    
Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.

                

                
                
                

                    
                    
                

                
                
                

                    
                    
                

                
                
                

                    
                    

                        

                            
                            
                            
                            
                        

                    

                    
                

                
                
                

                    
                    
                    

                        Use {{parameter_name}} to insert parameter values.
                        Example: [my_shortcode title="Hello" content="World"]
                    

                

                
                
                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        Enter template and parameters above, then click Preview
